headlines.title: The Dow leaps to a record as oil prices ease and stocks outside of AI rally
Stock Market Today, June 4: Broadcom Shares Plunge After AI Outlook Misses High Investor Expectations
US signaled it could impose additional tariffs
Oil Prices Decline On Fragile Peace Hope In Middle East
The U.S.-China Trade Stalemate: What It Means for Global Markets

notes: S&P 500 rose modestly, led by value stocks outside of tech, while the Dow closed at a record high.
NASDAQ dipped due to weakness in semiconductor stocks following Broadcom's underwhelming AI revenue guidance.
Treasury yields and crude oil prices dropped as geopolitical tensions in the Middle East showed signs of easing.
Market sentiment reflects increasing confidence in potential resolutions to ongoing U.S.-Iran negotiations.
